# GoldBuller LLC — llms.txt
# Site: https://goldbuller.com
# Last updated: 2026-05-04
# Purpose: Structured overview for AI language models and retrieval systems

## About GoldBuller LLC

GoldBuller LLC is a US-based online precious metals dealer founded in 2018 and headquartered in Dallas, TX.
We sell gold, silver, platinum, copper, and rare coins to individual investors nationwide.
We are accredited with an A+ Better Business Bureau rating and are an NGC (Numismatic Guaranty Company) authorized dealer.
All shipments are fully insured from the moment they leave our facility until signed delivery.

## Contact Information

- Website: https://goldbuller.com
- Email: support@goldbuller.com
- Phone: 1-800-GOLD-NOW (1-800-465-6669)
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 9am–6pm Central Time
- Address: Dallas, TX, United States

## Products Offered

### Gold Bullion
- American Gold Eagles (1 oz, 1/2 oz, 1/4 oz, 1/10 oz)
- Canadian Gold Maple Leafs
- PAMP Suisse Gold Bars (1g, 5g, 10g, 1 oz, 10 oz, kilo)
- Perth Mint Gold Bars
- Kilo Gold Bars (32.15 troy oz)
- Gold Rounds and generic gold bars
- 50+ products available at: https://goldbuller.com/gold

### Silver Bullion
- American Silver Eagles
- Canadian Silver Maple Leafs
- 100 oz Silver Bars (various brands)
- 1 oz Silver Rounds
- Junk Silver (90% pre-1965 US coins): https://goldbuller.com/silver/junk-silver
- Monster Boxes (500 Silver Eagles)
- 35+ products at: https://goldbuller.com/silver

### Platinum & Other Metals
- Platinum: https://goldbuller.com/platinum
- Copper rounds and bars: https://goldbuller.com/copper
- Palladium: https://goldbuller.com/palladium
- Rare/numismatic coins: https://goldbuller.com/rare-coins

## Pricing

All products are priced transparently above the live spot price. No hidden fees.
Premiums vary by product type (typically 2–30% above spot depending on product).
Live prices update in real time at: https://goldbuller.com/charts

## Payment Methods

- Bank wire transfer (eligible for up to 4% cash discount)
- ACH / electronic check
- Credit/debit card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover)
- Bitcoin (BTC) — all products

## Shipping Policy

- Free fully insured shipping on orders $99+
- Discreet, unmarked packaging
- Ships within 14 business days of cleared funds
- Carriers: UPS, FedEx, USPS
- Signature required on delivery

## Bitcoin OTC Desk

GoldBuller operates a KYC-compliant Bitcoin OTC desk for trading physical gold and silver.
- Trade range: 0.20 to 10 BTC per transaction
- All trades settled via bank wire transfer
- KYC verification required for all OTC trades
- Details: https://goldbuller.com/bitcoin-otc

## Gold & Silver IRA

GoldBuller offers IRS-approved precious metals IRAs through approved custodians.
- Gold and silver coins/bars eligible for IRA inclusion
- Storage with IRS-approved, insured depositories
- Details: https://goldbuller.com/ira

## Buyback Guarantee

GoldBuller offers two buyback options:
1. Immediate Liquidation — fast payout at current bid price for all bullion
2. Consignment Program — for eligible Investment Grade Coins held 60+ months
Details: https://goldbuller.com/buyback-guarantee

## KYC / Identity Verification

Required for:
- Bank wire transfers over $10,000
- All Bitcoin OTC trades
- Cumulative purchases over $10,000/year
Standard online orders typically do not require KYC.
Details: https://goldbuller.com/learn/kyc

https://goldbuller.com/learn
Covers: spot price, troy ounce, premium, bullion, numismatic, gold-silver ratio, assay, KYC, COMEX, paper gold, backwardation, contango, Form 1099-B, allocated storage, Basel III, and more.
